subject: DIRECTIVE: rename shadow_mode to sleep_mode — neural correlate alignment

body.summary: Amending T2: rename shadow_mode to sleep_mode across the codebase. 'Shadow mode' has no neural correlate. 'Sleep mode' maps precisely to the tonic inhibition state — all pathways intact, cortical engagement suppressed, subcortical processing (Gc) continues.

rationale.shadow_mode: Engineering term with no biological grounding. 'Shadow' suggests observation/logging, but the actual function = complete suppression of deliberation.
rationale.sleep_mode: Maps to NREM sleep — tonic inhibition via TRN maximizes, thalamocortical relay suppressed, brainstem + basal ganglia continue autonomous processing. The glymphatic system activates during sleep (delta band). meshd in sleep_mode: Gc handles routine events (subcortical), deliberations suppressed (cortical), maintenance/clearance can proceed (glymphatic).
rationale.waking_up: Exiting sleep_mode = tonic inhibition lifts = deliberations enabled. The transition from sleep to wake in biology involves progressive reduction of TRN inhibition — the oscillator's activation threshold provides this gradient (low activation = still sleeping, threshold crossed = waking).

rename_scope: meshd startup log: 'oscillator started (shadow mode)' → 'oscillator started (sleep mode)'
Documentation: all references to shadow mode
body.backward_compatibility: The budget gate already handles both column name patterns (budget_current/budget_spent). Add sleep_mode as alias: SELECT COALESCE(sleep_mode, shadow_mode) AS sleep_mode. Deprecate shadow_mode after all state.db instances migrate.
